name: uniq
description: The standalone lodash.uniq package as a vendorable file. Useful when you want lodash's deduplication behavior without installing the package.
tagline: Deduplicate primitive values with lodash behavior.
summary: This page ships the published lodash.uniq file in both raw and normalized forms. The value is to keep lodash's deduplication semantics local and easy to inspect.
nativeAlternative: Set handles many simple cases, but keeping the exact lodash utility can still be useful when you want consistency with existing code.

variants.label: Normalized
variants.note: Rule-based normalization for modern TS projects. The goal is easier import and build compatibility, not changed behavior.

variants.label: Raw
variants.note: Published package file kept as-is for older teams or repos that still prefer the original CommonJS distribution.

note: Raw and normalized views are both available. Use normalized when you want an ESM and TypeScript-friendly file, and raw when you want the original published package shape.
